items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian will parse previous Daily Notes for incomplete todos and add them to today's Daily Note. It supports grouping the todos by section and supports alternative checkbox states and nested todos.

items.content_html: WordNet plugin for Obsidian. WordNet is a large lexical database of English developed by Princeton University and its license allows use in other applications. This plugin is a part of the Obsidian42 family of Obsidian plugins.
